headline.vsl_adaptation: If you're worried about the side effects of your arthritis pain medication, you're not alone. More and more sufferers are discovering a topical alternative that works completely differently...

lead.opening_verbatim: It's an indisputable and unfortunate fact of life for arthritis sufferers: oral pain medications for arthritis, including over-the-counter pain relievers and anti-inflammatory medications, carry a long list of potential side effects. Just look at the warning labels on any of these medications, and you will be amazed by the problems that could arise.
lead.hook_mechanism: Warning label fear + side effect concern
lead.transition_to_body: Of course, most people who take these prescription or over-the-counter medications don't think twice when they're in pain.

mechanism.mechanism_description: Active ingredient triggers vasodilation (widening of blood vessels) in the treated area to increase circulation. This mimics one of the body's natural ways to relieve pain. Different from capsaicin (burns) or menthol (strong odor) products.

proof_elements.verbatim: available for purchase at retailers everywhere, including Walmart, Walgreens, Target, CVS/pharmacy, Rite Aid and also in many supermarkets
According to the FDA, some products with these ingredients have caused skin irritation in rare instances
backed by an exclusive Empty Jar Guarantee. If you are not completely satisfied, you can send back the empty jar for a full refund - no questions asked.

key_sections.content_verbatim: Some of the most widely used topical products contain capsaicin, which is an active component in hot peppers and has a warming effect on the skin. Others use menthol, which has a strong odor. According to the FDA, some products with these ingredients have caused skin irritation in rare instances.

Unlike other topical pain relief products, Australiandream has no odor, no greasy residue, and it does not burn the skin. It is a gentle, soothing cream that effectively relieves arthritis pain wherever you put it - your hands and other joints - without the side effects of some oral pain relievers.

Australiandream works differently from most pain relievers - topical or oral - but it is real medicine that provides real pain relief. Its active ingredient triggers vasodilation, or a widening of the blood vessels in the treated area, to increase circulation. This is actually one of the body's natural ways to relieve pain.

offer.guarantee: Empty Jar Guarantee - return empty jar for full refund
